Console, log, and fatal message handling, time retrieval, and JerryScript environment initialization on Mbed OS.


## Files
- **[jerry_port_mbed.c](jerry_port_mbed.c.md)**: Console, log, and fatal message handling, and time zone and current time retrieval for JerryScript on Mbed OS.
- **[main.cpp](main.cpp.md)**: Initializes and launches a JerryScript environment on Mbed OS with serial communication setup.
